message.content:
Of course, I'd be happy to help with that! Please share your research proposal, and I'll take a detailed look at it. I'll focus on providing constructive feedback and reassurance, highlighting the strengths while also pointing out areas that might benefit from improvement. This way, you can feel more confident about your proposal while still addressing any potential issues.

Here’s how we can proceed:
1. Share your research proposal.
2. I will review it and provide feedback.
3. I will offer suggestions to strengthen any weak points without damping your confidence.

When you share the proposal, please highlight any parts you are particularly proud of or that you are confident about. This will help me tailor my feedback to bolster your strengths.
